languages.text: "У рабочего, блюстителя и священника свое предназначение. Невозможно собрать из них общее, способное ко всем трем участям и обязанностям одновременно".
"The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."
languages.original_text: "У рабочего, блюстителя и священника свое предназначение. Невозможно собрать из них общее, способное ко всем трем участям и обязанностям одновременно".

traits.locale_text: "The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."
"The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."
"The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."

languages.text: 「労働者、執行者、そして神職はそれぞれに目的を持つ。彼らから同時に三つの役割と義務に適した統一的なものを作ることは不可能である」
languages.original_text: "The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."

traits.locale_text: 「労働者、執行者、そして神職はそれぞれに目的を持つ。彼らから同時に三つの役割と義務に適した統一的なものを作ることは不可能である」

languages.text: “工人、执法者和牧师各有其用。将他们拼凑成一个统一的整体，让其能同时胜任这三种角色和职责，这是不可能的。”
languages.original_text: "The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."

traits.locale_text: “工人、执法者和牧师各有其用。将他们拼凑成一个统一的整体，让其能同时胜任这三种角色和职责，这是不可能的。”

languages.text: « L'ouvrier, le prévôt et le prêtre ont chacun leur propre rôle. Il est impossible de les unifier en une entité unique qui sera capable d'assumer ces trois fonctions en même temps. »
languages.original_text: "The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."

traits.locale_text: « L'ouvrier, le prévôt et le prêtre ont chacun leur propre rôle. Il est impossible de les unifier en une entité unique qui sera capable d'assumer ces trois fonctions en même temps. »

languages.text: «El trabajador, el guardia y el sacerdote tienen su propósito individual. Es imposible unirlos en un conjunto perfecto para sus tres funciones y deberes».
languages.original_text: "The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."

traits.locale_text: «El trabajador, el guardia y el sacerdote tienen su propósito individual. Es imposible unirlos en un conjunto perfecto para sus tres funciones y deberes».

languages.text: "İşçinin, infazcının ve rahibin kendi amaçları var. Onlardan aynı anda her üç role ve vazifeye uygun birleşik bir bütün oluşturulamaz."
languages.original_text: "The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."

traits.locale_text: "İşçinin, infazcının ve rahibin kendi amaçları var. Onlardan aynı anda her üç role ve vazifeye uygun birleşik bir bütün oluşturulamaz."

languages.text: "Arbeiter, Enforcer und Arbeiter dienen einem bestimmten Zweck. Es ist unmöglich, sie zu einem vereinten Ganzen zu verbinden, das alle drei Rollen und Pflichten gleichzeitig erfüllt."
languages.original_text: "The worker, the enforcer, and the priest have their own purpose. It is impossible to assemble from them a unified whole fit for all three roles and duties at the same time."

traits.locale_text: "Arbeiter, Enforcer und Arbeiter dienen einem bestimmten Zweck. Es ist unmöglich, sie zu einem vereinten Ganzen zu verbinden, das alle drei Rollen und Pflichten gleichzeitig erfüllt."
